_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: CurseForge Generic
author: contact@chromozone.dev
description: A generic egg for CurseForge modpacks. Supports Cloudflare Worker proxy to bypass WAF IP blocking on datacenter IPs (OCI, AWS, etc).
startup: java $([[ -f user_jvm_args.txt ]] && printf %s "@user_jvm_args.txt") -Xms128M -Xmx{{SERVER_MEMORY}}M -Dterminal.jline=false -Dterminal.ansi=true $([[ ! -f unix_args.txt ]] && printf %s "-jar `cat .serverjar`" || printf %s "@unix_args.txt")

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# shellcheck disable=SC2155
#
# CurseForge Generic Modpack Installer
# Uses Java's native HTTP/TLS stack + optional Cloudflare Worker proxy
# to bypass CloudFront WAF IP blocking on datacenter IPs (OCI, AWS, etc).
#
# Server Files: /mnt/server

: "${SERVER_DIR:=/mnt/server}"
: "${PROJECT_ID:=}"
: "${VERSION_ID:=}"
: "${API_KEY:=}"
: "${CF_API_PROXY:=}"

if [[ ! -d $SERVER_DIR ]]; then
    mkdir -p "$SERVER_DIR"
fi

if ! cd "$SERVER_DIR"; then
    echo -e "Failed to change directory to ${SERVER_DIR}"
    exit 1
fi

function install_required {
    echo -e "Installing required packages..."
    echo -e "\tRunning apt update"
    apt update > /dev/null 2>&1 || { echo "apt update failed!"; exit 1; }
    echo -e "\tRunning apt install"
    apt install -y curl jq unzip > /dev/null 2>&1 || { echo "apt install failed!"; exit 1; }
}

# ─── CurseForge API URL Setup ───────────────────────────────────
# If CF_API_PROXY is set, route all API calls through it.
# This bypasses CloudFront WAF IP blocking on datacenter IPs.

if [[ -n "${CF_API_PROXY}" ]]; then
    CF_API_PROXY="${CF_API_PROXY%/}"
    CURSEFORGE_API_URL="${CF_API_PROXY}/v1/mods/"
    echo -e "Using CurseForge API proxy: ${CF_API_PROXY}"
else
    CURSEFORGE_API_URL="https://api.curseforge.com/v1/mods/"
fi

# ─── Java-based HTTP Client ─────────────────────────────────────
# Uses Java's native TLS stack for a genuine JA3 fingerprint.

function setup_cf_fetcher() {
    echo -e "Setting up CurseForge API client..."
    {
        echo 'import java.io.*;'
        echo 'import java.net.*;'
        echo 'import java.nio.file.*;'
        echo 'public class CurseForgeFetcher {'
        echo '    public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception {'
        echo '        if (args.length < 2) {'
        echo '            System.err.println("Usage: CurseForgeFetcher <url> <api-key>");'
        echo '            System.exit(1);'
        echo '        }'
        echo '        HttpURLConnection c = (HttpURLConnection) new URL(args[0]).openConnection();'
        echo '        c.setRequestProperty("Accept", "application/json");'
        echo '        c.setRequestProperty("x-api-key", args[1]);'
        echo '        c.setConnectTimeout(15000);'
        echo '        c.setReadTimeout(30000);'
        echo '        c.setInstanceFollowRedirects(true);'
        echo '        int code = c.getResponseCode();'
        echo '        if (code != 200) {'
        echo '            InputStream es = c.getErrorStream();'
        echo '            String body = "";'
        echo '            if (es != null) {'
        echo '                ByteArrayOutputStream b = new ByteArrayOutputStream();'
        echo '                byte[] t = new byte[1024]; int l;'
        echo '                while ((l = es.read(t)) != -1) b.write(t, 0, l);'
        echo '                body = b.toString("UTF-8");'
        echo '            }'
        echo '            System.err.println("HTTP " + code + ": " + body);'
        echo '            System.exit(1);'
        echo '        }'
        echo '        InputStream in = c.getInputStream();'
        echo '        byte[] buf = new byte[8192]; int n;'
        echo '        while ((n = in.read(buf)) != -1) System.out.write(buf, 0, n);'
        echo '        in.close();'
        echo '    }'
        echo '}'
    } > /tmp/CurseForgeFetcher.java
    sed -i 's/\r$//' /tmp/CurseForgeFetcher.java 2>/dev/null || true
    if ! javac /tmp/CurseForgeFetcher.java -d /tmp/ 2>/dev/null; then
        echo -e "\tERROR: Java compiler failed."
        exit 1
    fi
    echo -e "\tAPI client ready."
}

# Wrapper: CurseForge API call via Java (or curl if using proxy) with retry
function cf_api_get() {
    local url="$1"
    local retries=3
    local attempt=1
    while [[ $attempt -le $retries ]]; do
        local result
        if [[ -n "${CF_API_PROXY}" ]]; then
            # Cloudflare Worker doesn't need JA3 spoofing and requires modern TLS (which Java 8 lacks)
            result=$(curl -sSL --compressed -H "x-api-key: ${API_KEY}" -H "Accept: application/json" "${url}" 2>/tmp/cf_err.log)
        else
            # Direct connection needs Java for JA3 bypass
            result=$(java -cp /tmp CurseForgeFetcher "${url}" "${API_KEY}" 2>/tmp/cf_err.log)
        fi
        if [[ $? -eq 0 && -n "$result" ]]; then
            echo "$result"
            return 0
        fi
        echo -e "\t[WARN] API attempt ${attempt}/${retries} failed: $(cat /tmp/cf_err.log 2>/dev/null)" >&2
        attempt=$((attempt + 1))
        sleep 2
    done
    echo -e "\t[ERROR] All API attempts failed for: ${url}" >&2
    if [[ -z "${CF_API_PROXY}" ]]; then
        echo -e "\t[HINT] Your server IP may be blocked by CurseForge WAF." >&2
        echo -e "\t[HINT] Set the CF_API_PROXY variable to a Cloudflare Worker proxy URL." >&2
    fi
    return 1
}

CURL_ARGS=(-sSL --compressed)

function get_download {
    echo -e "\n============================================="
    echo -e "Fetching CurseForge project data..."
    echo -e "Project ID: ${PROJECT_ID}"
    echo -e "=============================================\n"

    local PROJECT_DATA
    PROJECT_DATA=$(cf_api_get "${CURSEFORGE_API_URL}${PROJECT_ID}")

    if [[ -z "${PROJECT_DATA}" || "${PROJECT_DATA}" == "null" ]]; then
        echo -e "\tERROR: Failed to retrieve project data for project id '${PROJECT_ID}'"
        echo -e "\tCheck your API key and project ID."
        exit 1
    fi

    local PROJECT_TITLE=$(echo "$PROJECT_DATA" | jq -r '.data.name // empty')
    echo -e "\tProject: ${PROJECT_TITLE}"

    local IS_SERVER_PACK=false

    if [[ -z "${VERSION_ID}" || "${VERSION_ID}" == "latest" ]]; then
        echo -e "\tNo file ID specified, using latest file"
        VERSION_ID=$(echo "$PROJECT_DATA" | jq -r '.data.mainFileId // empty')

        local VERSION_SERVER_PACK="$(echo "${PROJECT_DATA}" | jq -r --arg VERSION_ID "$VERSION_ID" '.data.latestFiles[] | select(.id|tostring==$VERSION_ID) | .isServerPack')"
        local VERSION_SERVER_ID="$(echo "${PROJECT_DATA}" | jq -r --arg VERSION_ID "$VERSION_ID" '.data.latestFiles[] | select(.id|tostring==$VERSION_ID) | .serverPackFileId')"

        if [[ "${VERSION_SERVER_PACK}" == "false" && -n "${VERSION_SERVER_ID}" && "${VERSION_SERVER_ID}" != "null" ]]; then
            echo -e "\tFound server pack file id '${VERSION_SERVER_ID}'"
            VERSION_ID=$VERSION_SERVER_ID
            IS_SERVER_PACK=true
        elif [[ "${VERSION_SERVER_PACK}" == "true" ]]; then
            IS_SERVER_PACK=true
        fi
    else
        echo -e "\tChecking if provided file id '${VERSION_ID}' exists"

        local FILE_DATA
        FILE_DATA=$(cf_api_get "${CURSEFORGE_API_URL}${PROJECT_ID}/files/${VERSION_ID}")

        if [[ -z "${FILE_DATA}" ]]; then
            echo -e "\tERROR: File id '${VERSION_ID}' not found for project '${PROJECT_TITLE}'"
            exit 1
        fi

        IS_SERVER_PACK=$(echo "${FILE_DATA}" | jq -r '.data.isServerPack // "false"')

        if [[ "${IS_SERVER_PACK}" == "false" ]]; then
            local VERSION_SERVER_PACK="$(echo "${FILE_DATA}" | jq -r '.data.serverPackFileId // empty')"
            if [[ -n "${VERSION_SERVER_PACK}" && "${VERSION_SERVER_PACK}" != "null" ]]; then
                echo -e "\tFound server pack file id '${VERSION_SERVER_PACK}'"
                VERSION_ID=$VERSION_SERVER_PACK
                IS_SERVER_PACK=true
            fi
        else
            IS_SERVER_PACK=true
        fi
    fi

    if [[ -z "${VERSION_ID}" ]]; then
        echo -e "\tERROR: No file id found for project '${PROJECT_TITLE}'"
        exit 1
    fi

    if [[ "${IS_SERVER_PACK}" == "false" ]]; then
        echo -e "\tWARNING: File id '${VERSION_ID}' is not a server pack, attempting to use client files"
    fi

    echo -e "\tRetrieving version information for '${VERSION_ID}'"
    local JSON_DATA
    JSON_DATA=$(cf_api_get "${CURSEFORGE_API_URL}${PROJECT_ID}/files/${VERSION_ID}/download-url")

    if [[ -z "${JSON_DATA}" ]]; then
        echo -e "\tERROR: Failed to retrieve file data for file id '${VERSION_ID}'"
        exit 1
    fi

    echo -e "\tParsing CurseForge pack download url"

    local DOWNLOAD_URL=$(echo "$JSON_DATA" | jq -r '.data // empty')
    if [[ -z "${DOWNLOAD_URL}" || "${DOWNLOAD_URL}" == "null" ]]; then
        echo -e "\tERROR: No download url found for file ${VERSION_ID}"
        exit 1
    fi

    echo -e "\tDownloading ${DOWNLOAD_URL}"
    if ! curl "${CURL_ARGS[@]}" "${DOWNLOAD_URL}" -o server.zip; then
        echo -e "Download failed!"
        exit 1
    fi
}

function get_loader {
    echo -e "Retrieving loader information..."

    local PROJECT_DATA
    PROJECT_DATA=$(cf_api_get "${CURSEFORGE_API_URL}${PROJECT_ID}")
    local PROJECT_TITLE=$(echo "$PROJECT_DATA" | jq -r '.data.name // empty')
    if [[ -z "${PROJECT_DATA}" ]]; then
        echo -e "\tERROR: Failed to retrieve project data for project id '${PROJECT_ID}'"
        exit 1
    fi

    local FILE_DATA
    FILE_DATA=$(cf_api_get "${CURSEFORGE_API_URL}${PROJECT_ID}/files/${VERSION_ID}")

    if [[ -z "${FILE_DATA}" ]]; then
        echo -e "\tERROR: File id '${VERSION_ID}' not found for project '${PROJECT_TITLE}'"
        exit 1
    fi

    local IS_SERVER_PACK=$(echo "${FILE_DATA}" | jq -r '.data.isServerPack // "false"')
    local CLIENT_VERSION_ID;

    if [[ "${IS_SERVER_PACK}" == "true" ]]; then
        CLIENT_VERSION_ID="$(echo "${FILE_DATA}" | jq -r '.data.parentProjectFileId // empty')"
    else
        CLIENT_VERSION_ID=$VERSION_ID
    fi

    if [[ -z "${CLIENT_VERSION_ID}" || "${CLIENT_VERSION_ID}" == "null" ]]; then
        echo -e "\tERROR: Client file id not found for project '${PROJECT_TITLE}'"
        exit 1
    fi

    echo -e "\tRetrieving file information for '${CLIENT_VERSION_ID}'"
    local JSON_DATA
    JSON_DATA=$(cf_api_get "${CURSEFORGE_API_URL}${PROJECT_ID}/files/${CLIENT_VERSION_ID}/download-url")

    echo -e "\tParsing CurseForge pack download url"

    local DOWNLOAD_URL=$(echo "$JSON_DATA" | jq -r '.data // empty')

    if [[ -z "${DOWNLOAD_URL}" || "${DOWNLOAD_URL}" == "null" ]]; then
        echo -e "\tERROR: No download url found for file id ${CLIENT_VERSION_ID}"
        exit 1
    fi

    echo -e "\tDownloading ${DOWNLOAD_URL}"
    curl "${CURL_ARGS[@]}" "${DOWNLOAD_URL}" -o client.zip

    echo -e "\tUnpacking client manifest"
    unzip -jo client.zip manifest.json -d "${SERVER_DIR}"
    mv "${SERVER_DIR}/manifest.json" "${SERVER_DIR}/client.manifest.json"
    rm -rf client.zip

    echo -e "\tParsing client manifest"
    local MANIFEST="${SERVER_DIR}/client.manifest.json"

    LOADER_ID=$(jq -r '.minecraft.modLoaders[]? | select(.primary == true) | .id' "${MANIFEST}")
    LOADER_NAME=$(echo "${LOADER_ID}" | cut -d'-' -f1)
    LOADER_VERSION=$(echo "${LOADER_ID}" | cut -d'-' -f2)

    if [[ -z "${LOADER_NAME}" || -z "${LOADER_VERSION}" ]]; then
        echo -e "\tERROR: No loader found in client manifest!"
        exit 1
    fi

    MINECRAFT_VERSION=$(jq -r '.minecraft.version // empty' "${MANIFEST}")

    if [[ -z "${MINECRAFT_VERSION}" ]]; then
        echo -e "\tERROR: No minecraft version found in client manifest!"
        exit 1
    fi

    echo -e "\tFound loader ${LOADER_NAME} ${LOADER_VERSION} for Minecraft ${MINECRAFT_VERSION}"
}

function unzip-strip() (
    set -u

    local archive=$1
    local destdir=${2:-}
    shift; shift || :
    echo -e "\tUnpacking ${archive} to ${destdir}"

    echo -e "\tCreating temporary directory"
    local tmpdir=/mnt/server/tmp
    if ! mkdir -p "${tmpdir}"; then
        echo -e "\tERROR: mkdir failed to create temporary directory"
        return 1
    fi

    trap 'rm -rf -- "$tmpdir"' EXIT

    echo -e "\tUnpacking archive"

    if ! unzip -q "$archive" -d "$tmpdir"; then
        echo -e "\tERROR: unzip failed to unpack archive"
        return 1
    fi

    echo -e "\tSetting glob settings"

    shopt -s dotglob

    echo -e "\tCleaning up directory structure"

    local files=("$tmpdir"/*) name i=1

    if (( ${#files[@]} == 1 )) && [[ -d "${files[0]}" ]]; then
        name=$(basename "${files[0]}")
        files=("$tmpdir"/*/*)
    else
        name=$(basename "$archive"); name=${archive%.*}
        files=("$tmpdir"/*)
    fi

    if [[ -z "$destdir" ]]; then
        destdir=./"$name"
    fi

    while [[ -f "$destdir" ]]; do
        destdir=${destdir}-$((i++));
    done

    echo -e "\tCopying files to ${destdir}"

    mkdir -p "$destdir"
    cp -ar "$@" -t "$destdir" -- "${files[@]}"
    rm -rf "$tmpdir"
)

function unpack_zip {
    echo -e "Unpacking server files..."
    unzip-strip server.zip "${SERVER_DIR}"
    rm -rf server.zip
}

function json_download_mods {
    echo "Downloading mods..."

    local MANIFEST="${SERVER_DIR}/manifest.json"
    if [[ ! -d "${SERVER_DIR}/mods" ]]; then
        mkdir -p "${SERVER_DIR}/mods"
    fi

    jq -c '.files[]? | select(.required == true) | {project: .projectID, file: .fileID}' "${MANIFEST}" | while read -r mod; do
        local MOD_PROJECT_ID=$(echo "${mod}" | jq -r '.project // empty')
        local MOD_FILE_ID=$(echo "${mod}" | jq -r '.file // empty')

        if [[ -z "${MOD_PROJECT_ID}" || -z "${MOD_FILE_ID}" ]]; then
            echo -e "\tERROR: Failed to parse project id or file id for mod '${mod}'"
            exit 1
        fi

        local FILE_URL
        FILE_URL=$(cf_api_get "${CURSEFORGE_API_URL}${MOD_PROJECT_ID}/files/${MOD_FILE_ID}/download-url" | jq -r '.data // empty')

        if [[ -z "${FILE_URL}" || "${FILE_URL}" == "null" ]]; then
            echo -e "\tERROR: No download url found for mod ${MOD_PROJECT_ID} ${MOD_FILE_ID}"
            exit 1
        fi

        echo -e "\tDownloading ${FILE_URL}"

        cd "${SERVER_DIR}/mods" || exit 1
        if ! curl "${CURL_ARGS[@]}" -J -O "${FILE_URL}"; then
            echo -e "\tERROR: Failed to download mod ${MOD_PROJECT_ID} ${MOD_FILE_ID}"
            exit 1
        fi
        cd "${SERVER_DIR}" || exit 1
    done
}

function json_download_overrides {
    echo "Copying overrides..."
    if [[ -d "${SERVER_DIR}/overrides" ]]; then
        cp -r "${SERVER_DIR}/overrides/"* "${SERVER_DIR}"
        rm -r "${SERVER_DIR}/overrides"
    fi
}

FORGE_INSTALLER_URL="https://maven.minecraftforge.net/net/minecraftforge/forge/"

function json_download_forge {
    echo "Downloading Forge..."

    local MC_VERSION=$MINECRAFT_VERSION
    local FORGE_VERSION=$LOADER_VERSION

    FORGE_VERSION="${MC_VERSION}-${FORGE_VERSION}"
    if [[ "${MC_VERSION}" == "1.7.10" || "${MC_VERSION}" == "1.8.9" ]]; then
        FORGE_VERSION="${FORGE_VERSION}-${MC_VERSION}"
    fi

    local FORGE_JAR="forge-${FORGE_VERSION}.jar"
    if [[ "${MC_VERSION}" == "1.7.10" ]]; then
        FORGE_JAR="forge-${FORGE_VERSION}-universal.jar"
    fi

    local FORGE_URL="${FORGE_INSTALLER_URL}${FORGE_VERSION}/forge-${FORGE_VERSION}"

    echo -e "\tUsing Forge ${FORGE_VERSION} from ${FORGE_URL}"

    local FORGE_INSTALLER="${FORGE_URL}-installer.jar"
    echo -e "\tDownloading Forge Installer ${FORGE_VERSION} from ${FORGE_INSTALLER}"

    if ! curl "${CURL_ARGS[@]}" -o forge-installer.jar "${FORGE_INSTALLER}"; then
        echo -e "\tERROR: Failed to download Forge Installer ${FORGE_VERSION}"
        exit 1
    fi

    rm -rf libraries/net/minecraftforge/forge/
    rm -f unix_args.txt

    echo -e "\tInstalling Forge Server ${FORGE_VERSION}"
    if ! java -jar forge-installer.jar --installServer > /dev/null 2>&1; then
        echo -e "\tERROR: Failed to install Forge Server ${FORGE_VERSION}"
        exit 1
    fi

    if [[ $MC_VERSION =~ ^1\.(17|18|19|20|21|22|23) || $FORGE_VERSION =~ ^1\.(17|18|19|20|21|22|23) ]]; then
        echo -e "\tDetected Forge 1.17 or newer version. Setting up Forge Unix arguments"
        ln -sf libraries/net/minecraftforge/forge/*/unix_args.txt unix_args.txt
    else
        mv "$FORGE_JAR" forge-server-launch.jar
        echo "forge-server-launch.jar" > ".serverjar"
    fi

    rm -f forge-installer.jar
}

NEOFORGE_INSTALLER_URL="https://maven.neoforged.net/releases/net/neoforged"
function json_download_neoforge {
    echo "Downloading NeoForge..."
    local NEOFORGE_VERSION=$LOADER_VERSION

    if [[ "${NEOFORGE_VERSION}" =~ "1.20.1-" ]]; then
        NEOFORGE_URL=$NEOFORGE_INSTALLER_URL/forge/${NEOFORGE_VERSION}/forge-${NEOFORGE_VERSION}
        ARTIFACT_NAME="forge"
    else
        NEOFORGE_URL=$NEOFORGE_INSTALLER_URL/neoforge/${NEOFORGE_VERSION}/neoforge-${NEOFORGE_VERSION}
        ARTIFACT_NAME="neoforge"
    fi

    echo -e "\tUsing NeoForge ${NEOFORGE_VERSION} from ${NEOFORGE_URL}"

    local NEOFORGE_INSTALLER="${NEOFORGE_URL}-installer.jar"
    echo -e "\tDownloading NeoForge Installer ${NEOFORGE_VERSION} from ${NEOFORGE_INSTALLER}"

    if ! curl "${CURL_ARGS[@]}" -o neoforge-installer.jar "${NEOFORGE_INSTALLER}"; then
        echo -e "\tERROR: Failed to download NeoForge Installer ${NEOFORGE_VERSION}"
        exit 1
    fi

    rm -rf libraries/net/neoforged/${ARTIFACT_NAME}
    rm -f unix_args.txt

    echo -e "\tInstalling NeoForge Server ${NEOFORGE_VERSION}"
    if ! java -jar neoforge-installer.jar --installServer > /dev/null 2>&1; then
        echo -e "\tERROR: Failed to install NeoForge Server ${NEOFORGE_VERSION}"
        exit 1
    fi

    ln -sf libraries/net/neoforged/${ARTIFACT_NAME}/*/unix_args.txt unix_args.txt

    rm neoforge-installer.jar
}

FABRIC_INSTALLER_URL="https://meta.fabricmc.net/v2/versions/installer"

function json_download_fabric {
    echo "Downloading Fabric..."

    local MC_VERSION=$MINECRAFT_VERSION
    local FABRIC_VERSION=$LOADER_VERSION

    local INSTALLER_JSON=$(curl "${CURL_ARGS[@]}" ${FABRIC_INSTALLER_URL} )
    local INSTALLER_VERSION=$(echo "$INSTALLER_JSON" | jq -r '.[0].version // empty')
    local INSTALLER_URL=$(echo "$INSTALLER_JSON" | jq -r '.[0].url // empty')

    if [[ -z "${INSTALLER_VERSION}" ]]; then
        echo -e "\tERROR: No Fabric installer version found"
        exit 1
    fi

    if [[ -z "${INSTALLER_URL}" ]]; then
        echo -e "\tERROR: No Fabric installer url found"
        exit 1
    fi

    echo -e "\tDownloading Fabric Installer ${MC_VERSION}-${FABRIC_VERSION} (${INSTALLER_VERSION}) from ${INSTALLER_URL}"

    if ! curl "${CURL_ARGS[@]}" -o fabric-installer.jar "${INSTALLER_URL}"; then
        echo -e "\tERROR: Failed to download Fabric Installer ${MC_VERSION}-${FABRIC_VERSION} (${INSTALLER_VERSION})"
        exit 1
    fi

    echo -e "\tInstalling Fabric Server ${MC_VERSION}-${FABRIC_VERSION} (${INSTALLER_VERSION})"
    if ! java -jar fabric-installer.jar server -mcversion "${MC_VERSION}" -loader "${FABRIC_VERSION}" -downloadMinecraft; then
        echo -e "\tERROR: Failed to install Fabric Server ${MC_VERSION}-${FABRIC_VERSION} (${INSTALLER_VERSION})"
        exit 1
    fi

    echo "fabric-server-launch.jar" > ".serverjar"

    rm -f fabric-installer.jar
}

QUILT_INSTALLER_URL="https://meta.quiltmc.org/v3/versions/installer"

function json_download_quilt {
    echo "Downloading Quilt..."

    local MC_VERSION=$MINECRAFT_VERSION
    local QUILT_VERSION=$LOADER_VERSION

    local INSTALLER_JSON=$(curl "${CURL_ARGS[@]}" ${QUILT_INSTALLER_URL} )
    local INSTALLER_VERSION=$(echo "$INSTALLER_JSON" | jq -r '.[0].version // empty')
    local INSTALLER_URL=$(echo "$INSTALLER_JSON" | jq -r '.[0].url // empty')

    if [[ -z "${INSTALLER_VERSION}" ]]; then
        echo -e "\tERROR: No Quilt installer version found"
        exit 1
    fi

    if [[ -z "${INSTALLER_URL}" ]]; then
        echo -e "\tERROR: No Quilt installer URL found"
        exit 1
    fi

    echo -e "\tDownloading Quilt Installer ${MC_VERSION}-${QUILT_VERSION} (${INSTALLER_VERSION}) from ${INSTALLER_URL}"

    if ! curl "${CURL_ARGS[@]}" -o quilt-installer.jar "${INSTALLER_URL}"; then
        echo -e "\tERROR: Failed to download Quilt Installer ${MC_VERSION}-${QUILT_VERSION} (${INSTALLER_VERSION})"
        exit 1
    fi

    echo -e "\tInstalling Quilt Server ${MC_VERSION}-${QUILT_VERSION} (${INSTALLER_VERSION})"
    if ! java -jar quilt-installer.jar install server "${MC_VERSION}" "${QUILT_VERSION}" --download-server --install-dir=./; then
        echo -e "\tERROR: Failed to install Quilt Server ${MC_VERSION}-${QUILT_VERSION} (${INSTALLER_VERSION})"
        exit 1
    fi

    echo "quilt-server-launch.jar" > ".serverjar"

    rm quilt-installer.jar
}

# ─── Main Execution ─────────────────────────────────────────────

install_required
setup_cf_fetcher

if [[ -z "${PROJECT_ID}" ]]; then
    echo "ERROR: You must specify a PROJECT_ID environment variable!"
    exit 1
fi

if [[ ! "${PROJECT_ID}" = "zip" ]]; then
	get_download
fi

get_loader
unpack_zip

if [[ -f "${SERVER_DIR}/manifest.json" ]]; then
    echo "Found manifest.json, installing mods"
    json_download_mods
    json_download_overrides
fi

if [[ -f "${SERVER_DIR}/client.manifest.json" ]]; then
    MANIFEST="${SERVER_DIR}/client.manifest.json"

    if [[ $LOADER_NAME == "forge" ]]; then
        json_download_forge
    fi

    if [[ $LOADER_NAME == "neoforge" ]]; then
        json_download_neoforge
    fi

    if [[ $LOADER_NAME == "fabric" ]]; then
        json_download_fabric
    fi

    if [[ $LOADER_NAME == "quilt" ]]; then
        json_download_quilt
    fi

fi

echo -e "\nInstall completed successfully, enjoy!"

variables.name: Modpack Project ID
variables.description:
The modpack project ID from the CurseForge site, or 'zip' if installing from an uploaded server.zip file.

Example: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/bofa-mods -> ID is 375152

variables.name: Modpack File ID
variables.description:
The file ID for a specific modpack version. Can be the main file or server pack file ID.

If not provided, the script retrieves the latest server/client pack available.

variables.name: CurseForge API Key
variables.description: Required. Get your API key at: https://console.curseforge.com

variables.name: CurseForge API Proxy
variables.description:
Optional. If your server gets 403 errors from CurseForge (common on OCI, some AWS/GCP IPs), you can use a community proxy.

Recommended value: https://api.curse.tools
